name: vacant room
hints: A vacant room with two important spells: Methuselah and Unravel.
GET METHUSELAH and GET UNRAVEL - both spells have important magical effects.
The Methuselah spell may affect age/time. The Unravel spell undoes things. EAST returns to the plain room. Take both spells.
notes: Vacant room with two spells: Spell of Methuselah (aging/time magic) and Unravel spell (undoes things). Accessed by PULL WEST from the plain room (10). East returns to the plain room.
